questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "You are a student, ___"
Complete the sentence: "She can speak French, ___"
Complete the sentence: "They don't eat meat, ___"
Complete the sentence: "He will be here soon, ___"
Complete the sentence: "It isn't very warm today, ___"
Find the mistake: "She is a nurse, isn't it?"
questions.answer: The tag pronoun must match the subject. 'She' → 'isn't she?'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "They likes football, don't they?"
questions.answer: 'They' takes the base form — no -s: 'They like football, don't they?'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "You aren't ready, are I?"
questions.answer: The tag pronoun must match the subject. 'You' → 'are you?'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "They doesn't like fish, do they?"
questions.answer: 'They' takes 'don't', not 'doesn't': 'They don't like fish, do they?'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "You speak English, don't he?"
questions.answer: The tag pronoun must match the subject. 'You' → 'don't you?'
